title: Pub-sub transport and envelope
description:
## Intent
As a collaborator, I want a shared gossip envelope and transport behavior so that updates propagate consistently over UDS and MQTT.

## Definition of Done
- Envelope schema and dedupe rules implemented in Rust and Python.
- UDS broker supports publish/subscribe with topic matching.
- MQTT client supports publish/subscribe with Mosquitto autostart.
- Transport selection and configuration are identical across runtimes.
creator: ryan.porter
